creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can portmgr@ land the patch here and backport to 2017Q3 (maybe also 2017Q2)? I can't reach an agreement with the maintainer.

(In reply to Matthew Rezny from comment #19)
> Where is it stated there is blanket approval for any upstream commit?

"any" strawman commit doesn't apply. The patch here is both a crash fix + a regression fix + was reviewed. Being "trivial and tested" it satisfies the requirement for "just fix it".

https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports-announce/2014-January/000073.html

> Which says OpenCL doesn't work on any version for him?

How does this invalidate the *disappeared* crash? Let's not mix different issues.
